name: GitHub
description: A GitHub account or organization connected to Meshery, enabling design and configuration sync with repositories - import and export designs, track changes in version control, and collaborate on infrastructure-as-code alongside Meshery's own insights.

discovered.description: Are you sure you want to transition from DISCOVERED to REGISTERED? This will register the discovered GitHub connection with Meshery.
Are you sure you want to transition from DISCOVERED to IGNORED? This will ignore the discovered GitHub connection.

registered.description: Are you sure you want to transition from REGISTERED to CONNECTED? This will connect to the GitHub connection.
Are you sure you want to transition from REGISTERED to IGNORED? This will keep the GitHub registration but not connect to it.

connected.description: Are you sure you want to transition from CONNECTED to DISCONNECTED? This will disconnect the GitHub connection.
Are you sure you want to transition from CONNECTED to DELETED? This will remove the GitHub connection completely.

disconnected.description: Are you sure you want to transition from DISCONNECTED to CONNECTED? This will reconnect the GitHub connection.
Are you sure you want to transition from DISCONNECTED to DELETED? This will remove the GitHub connection completely.

url.title: GitHub API URL
url.description: Base URL of the GitHub API (e.g. https://api.github.com, or your GitHub Enterprise Server API endpoint).

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: GitHub organization or username this connection is scoped to.

name.title: Connection Name
name.description: Optional friendly name for this GitHub connection.

secret.title: Personal Access Token
secret.description: GitHub personal access token (or OAuth token) used to authenticate API requests.
